<h1>вҷ«вӢҶпҪЎ вҷӘ вӮҠЛҡвҷ¬ пҫҹ.</h1>
<li>
  she/he
</li>
<li>
  genderflux
</li>
<li>
  limiromantic
</li>
<p>more info and prettier formatting in strawpge!</p>
